summary: Tested VibeCon P2 enhancements: dark-mode toggle (persistence, styling, icons), chat typing indicator with auto-reply, route fade transition. Also regression-tested existing 27 flows (header, nav, code block traffic lights, job card listing, breadcrumb, accept→submit→approved, reward interpolation, responsive collapse). 20/20 playwright scenarios PASS across light+dark modes. 0 console errors or warnings.
passed_tests: Header renders logo, nav-expert, nav-jobs, theme-toggle
Initial theme applied to <html data-theme> + localStorage key 'vibecon-theme'
Light mode body bg = rgb(247,247,248) (#f7f7f8)
Clicking theme-toggle switches to dark: data-theme='dark', localStorage='dark', body bg=rgb(9,9,11) (#09090b)
Sun icon (lucide-sun) shown in dark mode, Moon icon (lucide-moon) shown in light mode
Theme persists across reload (dark retained)
Dark mode job-card bg = rgb(24,24,27) (#18181b)
Dark mode code-block bg = rgb(0,0,0) with macOS traffic lights ::before (red #ff5f56 + yellow/green box-shadow)
Dark mode link-item uses --bg-inset = rgb(39,39,42) (#27272a) contrasting with card
Dark mode btn-primary inverts: bg=rgb(250,250,250) white, color=rgb(9,9,11) black
Theme toggle works across /, /jobs, /jobs/:id and through accepted/submitted/approved states
Chat typing indicator NOT present on initial load
Typing indicator appears immediately after solver sends with 3 .chat-typing-dot elements and 'Job Poster / typing…' meta
After ~1.8s, auto-reply message appended (chat-message-poster count +1) and typing indicator removed
main element has .page-fade class and remounts on route change (key=location.pathname)
Toggle back to light updates attr, localStorage, and swaps icon to Moon
FindExpert hero heading + code block traffic lights render correctly
Nav active states update on route change (nav-link-active class)
Jobs grid collapses to single column at ≤768px viewport
Full Accept → Submit → Approved flow works and reward points (500 pts) interpolated into reward-inset
